title: German Apple Pudding Dessert
description: A rich and creamy German-inspired apple pudding dessert, perfect for special occasions.

ingredients.name: apples
ingredients.notes: Granny Smith or other sweet-tart apples

instructions: Peel, core, and chop the apples. Set aside.
In a medium bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, and melted butter until well combined.
Beat in eggs, one at a time, until smooth.
Stir in milk, vanilla extract, and pudding mix until well combined.
Add the chopped apples to the batter and stir until they are evenly distributed.
Pour the batter into a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the edges are golden brown and the center is set.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
